content:
Got it — generative art Rubik's cube via p5.js with seeded randomness. A couple of unknowns to lock in:

<question-form id="task-type" title="Quick brief — 30 seconds">
{
  "description": "Routing this as algorithmic art. Skip what doesn't apply — I'll fill defaults.",
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": "taskType",
      "label": "What should I build?",
      "type": "radio",
      "required": true,
      "options": [
        "Prototype",
        "Live artifact",
        "Slide deck",
        "Image",
        "Video",
        "HyperFrames",
        "Audio",
        "Other"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "imageModel",
      "label": "Image model",
      "type": "radio",
      "required": true,
      "options": [
        "gpt-image-2",
        "gpt-image-1.5",
        "dall-e-3",
        "flux-1.1-pro",
        "midjourney-v7",
        "imagen-4"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "aspectRatio",
      "label": "Aspect ratio",
      "type": "radio",
      "required": true,
      "options": ["1:1", "16:9", "9:16", "4:3", "3:4"]
    },
    {
      "id": "style",
      "label": "Visual style",
      "type": "radio",
      "options": [
        "Isometric 3D — clean geometric cube with visible faces",
        "Exploded / deconstructed — cubes floating apart",
        "Abstract / procedural — cube as seed for generative patterns",
        "Photorealistic render",
        "Let the algorithm decide"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "constraints",
      "label": "Any constraints?",
      "type": "textarea",
      "placeholder": "Color palette, mood, seed, things to avoid..."
    }
  ]
}
</question-form>
